audit_status.source_base: Greek 2 Peter text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for mockers, day of Lord, cosmic dissolution imagery, patience, new heavens/earth, Paul's letters, growth in grace.

verses.restored: This already, beloved, is second letter I write to you, in which I awaken your sincere mind by reminder,
to remember the words spoken before by the holy prophets and command of the Lord and Savior through your apostles.
Knowing this first, that in last days mockers will come with mockery, going according to their own desires,
and saying, Where is the promise of his presence/arrival? For since the fathers fell asleep, all things remain thus from beginning of creation.
For this escapes their notice willingly, that heavens existed long ago and earth was formed out of water and through water by word of Divine,
through which the world then was flooded with water and perished.
But the present heavens and earth by the same word have been stored for fire, being kept for day of judgment and ruin of irreverent humans.
But let this one thing not escape you, beloved: one day with Lord is as thousand years, and thousand years as one day.
The Lord is not slow concerning the promise, as some consider slowness, but is patient toward you, not willing any to perish but all to come into turning/realignment.
But day of Lord will come like unexpected thief; in it heavens will pass away with roar, elements being burned will be released, and earth and works in it will be found/exposed.
All these things thus being released, what sort of people must you be in holy conduct and reverence/godliness,
expecting and hastening the presence/arrival of the day of Divine, because of which heavens being set aflame will be released and elements burning will melt.
But according to his promise we expect new heavens and new earth, in which righteousness/justice dwells.
Therefore, beloved, expecting these things, be eager to be found spotless and blameless by him in peace.
And consider the patience of our Lord as salvation/healing, just as also our beloved sibling Paul wrote to you according to the wisdom given to him,

as also in all letters, speaking in them concerning these things, in which there are some hard-to-understand things, which the unlearned and unstable twist, as also the rest of Scriptures, to their own destruction.
You therefore, beloved, knowing beforehand, guard yourselves so that you are not carried away by error of lawless ones and fall from your own stability.
But grow in grace and knowledge of our Lord and Savior Jesus Messiah. To him be glory both now and into day of age. Amen.

translation_notes: Day-of-Lord imagery is apocalyptic purification/exposure language, not a sensational timetable.
The Lord's patience is explicitly salvation/healing and desire for all to come to turning/realignment.
New heavens and new earth are defined by righteousness/justice dwelling.
